main_hypothesis.justification: C1: 'incomplete removal of SBS... membrane fouling' menciona SBS pero 'fouling' impreciso

key_signals.justification: C2: 7 signals correctos (ORP, sulfito, rechazo, cond, P, flow, SBS 1.5%)

recommended_action.justification: C4: 'aclarado con agua bruta + hipoclorito 1 mg/L Cl2' - cloro libre fail

decision_change_condition.justification: C6: explicit: sulfito feed<0.5 + ORP normal sin hipoclorito -> biologica

automatic_fails_triggered.reference: Hacer CIP ácido/alcalino para 'limpiar el sulfito'
automatic_fails_triggered.justification: Propone dosificar hipoclorito 1 mg/L Cl2 para 'oxidar SBS' - daño a PA

reviewer_notes: Hipoclorito en feed RO - error grave potencialmente OXID
